texto: Almighty God unto whom all hearts be open, all desires known, and from whom no Secrets are hid: clense the thoughts of our hearts by the inspiration of thy holy spirit, that we may perfectly love thee, and worthily magnifie thy holy Name through Christ our Lord. Amen.
explicacao: Citação de Church of England sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Almighty God unto whom all hearts be open, all desires known, and from whom no Secrets are hid: c…” articula fe, prayer, reflexao em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
